creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I start a VM on VirtualBox 5.2.18 on my laptop, it reboots immediately. I do not even get a kernel panic message, just a hard reset. I do not have this issue with a Ubuntu 18.04 LiveUSB.

Laptop/OS information:

 * FreeBSD 12.0-ALPHA2 r337934
 * HP EliteBook 1040 G3
 * Intel Core i7-6600U
 * 16GB DDR4-2133
 * 256GB M.2 SATA
 * Desktop: graphics/drm-next-kmod and Gnome 3.18
